headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 16, 2026**
article:
The Toronto Blue Jays secured a crucial 2-1 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Yohendrick Piñango leading the Blue Jays' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance. The St. Louis Cardinals took down the Kansas City Royals 4-2, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles 13-3, with Keibert Ruiz leading the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 5-RBI performance.

Several key players have been placed on the injured list, including Heliot Ramos of the San Francisco Giants, who suffered a right quad strain, and Trevor Story of the Boston Red Sox, who has been dealing with a sports hernia. Other players on the injured list include Ben Joyce of the Los Angeles Angels, Clay Holmes of the New York Mets, Max Fried of the New York Yankees, Matt Strahm of the Kansas City Royals, Matt Waldron of the San Diego Padres, and Blake Snell of the Los Angeles Dodgers.

The Chicago White Sox have made a significant trade, acquiring center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. The Athletics have also traded right-handed pitcher Eduarniel Núñez to the Baltimore Orioles for cash and right-handed pitcher Kyle Robinson to the Pittsburgh Pirates for second baseman Alika Williams.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Edge Tigers in Thrilling 2-1 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays took down the Detroit Tigers 2-1, securing a crucial win. Yohendrick Piñango led the Blue Jays' offense with a 2-hit, 1-home run performance, driving in 1 run.

top_news.title: **Cardinals Take Down Royals 4-2**
top_news.summary: The St. Louis Cardinals secured a 2-4 victory over the Kansas City Royals, with Kyle Leahy earning the win after 6.0 innings of work. Jac Caglianone led the Royals' offense with 2 hits, including a 5th home run of the season.

top_news.title: **Rockies Take Down Diamondbacks 4-2**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies secured a 2-4 victory over the Arizona Diamondbacks, with Tomoyuki Sugano earning the win and Antonio Senzatela notching the save. Mickey Moniak led the Diamondbacks with 2 RBI, while Eduardo Rodriguez pitched 5.1 innings with 6 strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Nationals Rout Orioles 13-3**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals dominated the Baltimore Orioles, securing a convincing 13-3 victory. Keibert Ruiz led the Nationals' offense with a 3-hit, 5-RBI performance, including a home run.

top_news.title: **Heliot Ramos Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: San Francisco Giants left fielder Heliot Ramos has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right quad strain. The injury occurred on May 16, 2026.

top_news.title: **White Sox Acquire Junior Perez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Chicago White Sox have acquired center fielder Junior Perez from the Athletics in exchange for left-handed pitcher Jackson Nove. The trade was completed on May 16, 2026.
